summary.zh: 红牛与维特尔以连续四届车手冠军开启这十年，纽维主导的空气动力学在排气吹扩散器年代大放异彩；2011 年 DRS 引入以促进超车；2014 年规则全面转向 1.6 升 V6 涡轮混合动力与更强大的 ERS 能量回收，热效率突破 50%，梅赛德斯就此展开长达数年的统治。
summary.en: Red Bull and Vettel opened the decade with four straight titles as Newey-led aerodynamics shone in the exhaust-blown-diffuser years; DRS was introduced in 2011 to help overtaking; in 2014 the rules switched fully to a 1.6-litre V6 turbo-hybrid with a more powerful ERS, pushing thermal efficiency above 50% and launching Mercedes into years of dominance.
